data.description:
** VALIDATE THAT THE FOLLOWING FINDINGS ARE ACCURATE AND VALID BEFORE PROCEEDING WITH THIS TICKET **
### P1 ‚Äî The implementation is a cyclic modular monolith, not the documented layering
An AST-level package dependency analysis, including lazy imports, produced one 13-package strongly connected component spanning `_cli`, `_commands`, `_store`, `graph`, `llm`, `signing`, `audit`, `attest`, and supporting packages.
Concrete inversions include:
- Storage imports command-layer fsck logic ([gitutil.py (line 106)](/Users/joeoakhart/rebar/src/rebar/_store/gitutil.py:106)).
- Graph mutation code imports command orchestration ([graph/_links.py (line 110)](/Users/joeoakhart/rebar/src/rebar/graph/_links.py:110)).
- A command imports CLI help presentation ([transition.py (line 500)](/Users/joeoakhart/rebar/src/rebar/_commands/transition.py:500)).
- The canonical storage write path directly invokes optional LLM enrichment ([event_append.py (line 450)](/Users/joeoakhart/rebar/src/rebar/_store/event_append.py:450)).
- Transition and claim maintain their own commit implementation rather than using the documented canonical primitive ([txn.py (line 10)](/Users/joeoakhart/rebar/src/rebar/_commands/txn.py:10)).
This conflicts with the ‚Äúthin interfaces‚Äù and ‚Äúone locked append+commit path‚Äù architecture narrative ([architecture.md (line 28)](/Users/joeoakhart/rebar/docs/architecture.md:28), [architecture.md (line 46)](/Users/joeoakhart/rebar/docs/architecture.md:46)). Lazy imports avoid runtime import failures but do not remove architectural coupling.
Recommended target:
- `domain`: events, state, reducer, graph rules; pure and dependency-free.
- `application`: ticket use cases and transaction coordination.
- `ports`: repository, synchronization, clock, signer, enrichment interfaces.
- `adapters`: Git, Jira, CLI, MCP, LLM, Gerrit.
- One transaction coordinator supporting single- and multi-event atomic operations.
Add an import-linter or AST architecture fitness test and break the SCC incrementally, starting with storage‚Üícommands, graph‚Üícommands, and storage‚ÜíLLM.
data.title: Restructure to enforce architectural separation of concerns
